notes: One umbrella domain for index trading inside the shared organism.
This is not a separate runtime project.
Detailed symbol rollout comes after the domain and session architecture is accepted.
European index family anchored in Poland time.
Primary operational window stays 12:00-14:00 PL for now.
US index family anchored in Poland time via New York market behavior.
Primary operational window stays 17:00-20:00 PL for now.

architecture_notes: INDEX_EU and INDEX_US stay in one domain but remain separate families.
The domain agent decides which family is primary and which is reserve inside the index domain.
The global coordinator decides whether INDICES may replace a degraded primary domain in a given part of the day.
